untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 'Candles within a third of the yearly low' — requires yearly_low indicator not in allowed list; (2) 'Candles within a third of the yearly high' — requires yearly_high indicator not in allowed list; (3) 'Downward retracement in uptrend' — requires trend analysis beyond allowed indicators; (4) 'Opening gap confirmation' — requires gap detection logic not available; (5) 'Measure rule to predict price target' — specific pattern measurement rule not translatable to indicator conditions; (6) 'price_pos_20' only provides 20-day position, not yearly thirds. The Advance Block pattern itself requires multi-candle formation recognition not expressible in the allowed rule format.
translation_notes: Partial translation attempted using tall candle proxies (upper_wick, lower_wick comparison), elevated range (range > atr_14), and volume confirmation. Exit uses breakout below 50-day MA as specified. However, core pattern recognition (3-candle advance block formation, yearly high/low thirds positioning, and opening gap confirmation) cannot be accurately expressed with available indicators. This pattern requires candlestick formation detection beyond simple indicator thresholds.
